nose.text: Itching and burning. Discharge yellow. Sore, scabby, stopped up

respiratory.text: Soreness of chest along trachea; cannot stand percussion. Gray sputa. Capillary bronchitis. Larynx and chest sore. Membranous croup-extends down trachea

keynotes.text: color="#800000">KAOLINUM Bolus alba (China Clay) Alumina Silicate (KAOLIN) A remedy for croup and bronchitis.
